name: tc-survivors
description: The default gate-fixture shape with an assertion-light colocated suite: `{package.json, tsconfig.json, src/**, tests/**}`, scanned at `src/`, whose source imports `../package.json`. The suite runs the code and pins nothing, so every mutant under `src/` survives. Scanned at `src/`, the gate must reach those survivors (sandbox rooted at this package root) and report them scan-path-relative.
